title: trichomanes digitatum var. corticola
intro: Trichomanes digitatum var. corticola, also known as the wall fern or corticole trichomanes fern, is a rare and endemic species of fern found in New Zealand. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, which may contribute to its traditional use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trichomanes digitatum var. corticola include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve antioxidant defenses, and support immune system function, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and preparation should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
